name: antimetal
description: Bring Antimetal's software investigation intelligence into Claude Code. Triage problems, investigate root causes, fetch observability artifacts, and apply remediations—all from your terminal.

commands.name: investigate
commands.description: Investigate a software problem — search issues, analyze root causes, and read investigative reports

commands.name: fix
commands.description: Apply Antimetal's remediation to your codebase, adapted for your local environment

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Configure the Antimetal MCP server and verify your API key

environmentVariables.name: ANTIMETAL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Antimetal API key (get one at antimetal.com under account settings)
